'''Nevana''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dubravan]] and local dweller at the [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Dubrava/Legends|Dubrava]].

==Biography==
Nevana met a drunk [[Jal Te Gniev]], who mentioned that [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was on [[Jazbina/Legends|Jazbina]]. A secret [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] supporter, Nevana nevertheless gave the name to the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Sarma]] in exchange for canceling a debt owed by her [[Nevana's father|father]], as she did not recognize it and figured him to be a criminal. Sarma betrayed Nevana to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], and she fled to the [[Unidentified bar (Dubrava)|cantina]] to ask Gniev what she had done. She was horrified to realize that she had turned in one of the Rebellion's greatest heroes, but did not have time to dwell long on it, as Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], tipped off by Sarma, [[Attack on a Dubravan bar|stormed]] in and shot her in the back.
